ksa_text: Ability to develop and communicate data quality investment strategies that prioritize remediation efforts based on business impact and organizational decision-making needs.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop a data management strategy that helps to prioritize investments and resource allocations (e.g., data analytics, data infrastructure).

eu_ai_act.top_element_label: Obligations of deployers of high-risk AI systems

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Develop a data management strategy that helps to prioritize investments and resource allocations (e.g., data analytics, data infrastructure).
Obligations of deployers of high-risk AI systems

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Quality KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.426) to justify inclusion for the Chief Data Scientist. Without stronger framework alignment, this ability KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain ability KSA be expected in real-world Chief Data Scientist roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Data Quality is not a standard competency expectation for Chief Data Scientist. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Chief Data Scientist competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.426) and edge-domain placement (Data Quality) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Chief Data Scientist. All passes support exclusion.
